chapter_title.en: Instructions to Ibn Abbas upon his appointment as the governor of Basra

text: سَعِ النَّاسَ بِوَجْهِكَ وَمَجْلِسِكَ وَحُكْمِكَ، وإِيَّاكَ وَالْغَضَبَ فَإِنَّهُ طَيْرَةٌ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: Meet people with a broad face, allow them free audience and pass generous orders. Avoid anger because it is a augury of Satan.
